hero.title: Bridging the gap between
hero.paragraph: Trivoxa Technologies was founded with a singular mission: to democratize high-end IT education and provide businesses with world-class digital solutions that drive real growth.

milestones.paragraph: Starting in a small shared office in Silicon Valley, Trivoxa began as a specialized training hub for UI/UX designers. We noticed a massive disconnect between academic learning and industry demands.
By 2022, we expanded our services to B2B IT consulting. We didn't just want to train talent; we wanted to build the products they'd eventually work on.

team.heading: Our Mentors & Minds
team.subheading: Meet the industry veterans who guide our curriculum.

members.name: Dr. Sarah Jenkins
members.bio: Former VP of Engineering with 20+ years in Silicon Valley. Passionate about equitable tech education.

members.name: Marcus Thorne
members.bio: Architecture lead for three Unicorn startups. Specializes in scalable Cloud & DevOps infrastructures.

members.name: Aisha Rahman
members.bio: Expert educator focused on project-based learning. Designs our industry-aligned course syllabi.

members.name: David Chen
members.bio: Award-winning UI/UX director. Teaches students how to balance aesthetics with user-centricity.

seo.h1: Bridging the gap between Ambition and Excellence
seo.title: About Trivoxa Technologies | Our Mission & Team
seo.description: Learn about Trivoxa's mission to democratize IT education. Meet our team of industry veterans and discover our journey since 2018.
seo.keywords: about Trivoxa, IT education company, tech training team, company mission
seo.ogDescription: Bridging the gap between ambition and excellence in IT education and enterprise solutions.

cta.heading: Want to help us shape the future of IT?
cta.paragraph: We are always looking for passionate instructors, developers, and designers to join our growing global team. Discover our culture and open roles.
